overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player traverses an elevated walkway with yellow railings, enters a covered auto shop area with neon signage, explores around a wrecked red car, and ascends a concrete staircase. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with benches and railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway with yellow safety railings on the left and wooden benches with tropical plants on the right

entered.detail: bright yellow safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated walkway
illuminated wooden seating with integrated lighting on the right side
large spiky tropical plants in planters alongside the benches
futuristic city buildings with glowing windows and neon signs in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, characterized by bright yellow safety railings and warmly lit wooden benches. Tropical plants line the right side while the futuristic city skyline glows in the distance. The camera moves forward steadily through this clean, well-maintained urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service corridor leading to auto shop

events.description: enters covered corridor with large yellow support pillar and metal fencing
ambient light drops significantly as entering the covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker covered corridor toward a distant figure standing near the auto shop entrance

notable_agents.action: standing still in the corridor ahead, facing toward the camera near the auto shop gate

entered.detail: massive yellow structural column supporting the overhead structure
metal security fencing and roll-up gates marking the auto shop boundary
human figure standing in the shadows near the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, enclosed corridor with wet concrete floors reflecting the dim lighting. A large yellow support pillar dominates the center while metal fencing appears on the left. A solitary figure stands in the distance near the auto shop entrance as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: auto repair shop with neon signage and wrecked vehicle

events.description: passes through metal gates into the auto shop area with bright neon signage
begins circling around the wrecked red car to explore the area

agents.ego_description: walking around the auto shop interior, circling the wrecked car and observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: crouching beside the wrecked red car, appearing to examine or search the vehicle

entered.detail: large red and white neon sign reading 'AUTOPARTS & CAR SERVICE' above the shop
damaged red sedan with open doors and missing parts, centrally positioned in the shop
industrial metal storage racks and shelving units along the walls
person in light-colored clothing crouched near the wrecked vehicle

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the auto shop area dominated by a bright neon 'AUTOPARTS & CAR SERVICE' sign. A wrecked red car sits in the center while an NPC crouches beside it. The player circles the vehicle, exploring the cluttered industrial space with metal shelving and various automotive debris scattered on the wet floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with storage containers

events.description: exits the auto shop into a narrow back alley with metal roll-up doors

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway passing shipping containers and metal roll-up doors

entered.detail: corrugated metal security doors on the buildings lining the alley
large industrial storage containers and dumpsters in the alleyway
scattered trash, boxes, and discarded items littering the alley floor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the auto shop behind, the camera moves into a narrow, dimly lit service alley. Metal roll-up doors line the walls while shipping containers and scattered debris fill the space. The environment feels more confined and utilitarian compared to the open shop area.

events.description: begins ascending the concrete staircase leading upward between buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide concrete staircase with integrated wall lighting, moving between building structures

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with linear lighting strips embedded in the walls
concrete structural overpass and stairwell enclosure
glowing billboard with red and white graphics on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending a wide concrete staircase with ambient lighting. The enclosed stairwell features modern architectural elements with glowing light strips along the walls. The player moves steadily upward, leaving the alley behind and transitioning to a higher level of the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polished urban walkway into the gritty depths of an industrial service area before ascending back toward the city heights. It begins on an elevated pedestrian path lined with yellow railings and tropical plants, moving steadily forward under the glow of a distant futuristic skyline. As the camera leaves the open walkway, the environment shifts into a darker, enclosed corridor with wet concrete floors and heavy support pillars, leading directly into an auto shop illuminated by a bright neon sign. The scene then circles a wrecked red car amidst industrial clutter before narrowing into a dim service alley filled with shipping containers and metal roll-up doors. Finally, the camera turns toward a wide concrete staircase, ascending through a modern stairwell with glowing light strips to reach a higher level of the urban landscape.
